author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: authz_product_price_mass_assignment
summary: Registers a low-privilege customer, attempts a description-only PUT against /api/Products/{id}, and verifies persistence via follow-up GET. Restores the original description on success so the catalog is left clean. Confirms vertical authorization failure on the product-update path that the same code path almost certainly permits price/name mutations through.
